title: Restore a Faded, Scratched Family Keepsake Photo to a Framed A4 Print
one_line_ask: Restore one treasured, faded and scratched 1970s family keepsake scan -- correct the color cast and faded contrast, recover clarity/detail, conceal scratches over the plain backdrop -- and deliver a framed-A4 print-ready file with a before/after approval board.

issues: Very minor: slight overall warm/orange cast is present and appropriate for brief — not a defect
Hairline scratch lines visible and period-correct — not a defect
Background reads as cream/off-white seamless — correct
Soft edge vignetting consistent with flatbed scan — acceptable
No severe AI artifacts detected; hands and fingers appear anatomically plausible
Composition is well-centred with all three subjects clearly visible and sharply rendered
Period-correct 1970s clothing, hair, glasses, and studio lighting confirmed
Faded low-contrast tones consistent with decayed C-print — intentional per brief
One minor concern: the woman's right hand/wrist area is slightly merged/soft but not severely distorted
No real-world brands, logos, or trademarks visible
